warnings.description: The maximum value for length is 5000 records; the first 5000 are returned. To see more, use the offset command to paginate results, or filter with the start, end, or facet parameters.

response.description:
Electricity sales to ultimate customer by state and sector (number of customers, average price, revenue, and megawatthours of sales).
